name: Diskit Monastery
description: The oldest and largest surviving Buddhist monastery in Nubra Valley, famous for the magnificent 32-meter tall statue of Maitreya Buddha facing down the Shyok river.
history: Founded by Changzem Tserab Zangpo, a disciple of Tsong Khapa, in the 14th century.
famousFor: Giant Maitreya Buddha, ancient Tibetan artifacts, panoramic valley views.
